LanguageData.CombatAI_TribalPoleCCTV.label: Parrot in the cage
LanguageData.CombatAI_TribalPoleCCTV.description: A parrot to keep sight of an area. Does not require power, need food to function. Does not function at night.
LanguageData.CombatAI_IndustrialPoleCCTV.label: Industrial Camera on Pole Mount
LanguageData.CombatAI_IndustrialPoleCCTV.description: An automated camera keep sight of an area.
LanguageData.CombatAI_SpacerPoleCCTV.label: Spacer Camera on Pole Mount
LanguageData.CombatAI_SpacerPoleCCTV.description: An advanced automated camera keep sight of an area. Higher vision range than industrial version and with nightvision optic for night time.
LanguageData.CombatAI_CCTVTurretIndustrial.label: Industrial Wall Mounted CCTV
LanguageData.CombatAI_CCTVTurretIndustrial.descriptio: Wall mounted automated camera. Only provides a conal field of vision, swivels around at fixed speed. Has more vision range than Pole Mount version.
LanguageData.CombatAI_CCTVTurretSpacer.label: Spacer Wall Mounted CCTV
LanguageData.CombatAI_CCTVTurretSpacer.description: Wall mounted automated camera. Only provides a conal field of vision, swivels around at fixed speed. Has more vision range than Pole Mount version. Higher vision range than industrial version and with nightvision optic for night time.
LanguageData.CombatAI_IndoorCCTV.label: Indoor Automated Camera
LanguageData.CombatAI_IndoorCCTV.description: Omnidirectional camera meant to be used indoors. Short range and consumes minimal power. Will never break down like its outdoor counterpart, but will short-circuit in rain.
